prompt_1:
def get_target_for_redirect(target: str, domain: str) -> str:
    '''Duba ko URL na manufa da aka bayar yana cikin yankin da aka bayar.
    Idan haka ne, dawo da URL na manufa don juyawa; in ba haka ba, koma zuwa URL na yankin don juyawa.
    Yi amfani da tsarin https.

    Misalai:
        get_target_for_redirect('https://music.example.com', 'example.com') -> 'https://music.example.com'
        get_target_for_redirect('https://example.com/service', 'example.com') -> 'https://example.com/service'
        get_target_for_redirect('https://blog.example.com/posts', 'example.com') -> 'https://blog.example.com/posts'
        get_target_for_redirect('https://another.com', 'example.com') -> 'https://example.com'

    Args:
        target (str): URL na manufa.
        domain (str): Sunan yankin, ba tare da tsarin ba.

    Returns:
        str: URL na juyawa.'''

prompt_1:
from typing import Dict


def store_info_in_header(
    info_type: str, info_content: str, header: Dict[str, str]
) -> Dict[str, str]:
    '''Store bayanan da aka bayar a cikin dictionary na HTTP response header da ke akwai a ƙarƙashin nau'in da aka bayyana.
Wannan aikin yana la'akari da nau'ikan bayanai masu zuwa: 'lang', 'encoding', 'cache'. Ana adana su a matsayin maɓallan 'Accept-Language', 'Accept-Encoding', da 'Cache-Control', bi da bi.
Ana karanta abun cikin bayanai daga buƙatun masu amfani.
Idan nau'in bayanan da aka bayyana yana da inganci, dole ne a sami sabuntaccen header na amsa tare da shi. Idan wani abu ya tafi ba daidai ba, aikin ya kamata ya dawo da asalin dictionary na header ba tare da wani canji ba.

Args:
	info_type (str): Nau'in bayanan da za a adana a cikin header.
	info_content (str): Abun cikin bayanan da za a adana a cikin header.
	header (Dict[str, str]): Dictionary na header na amsa da ke akwai.

Returns:
	Dict[str, str]: Sabuntaccen dictionary na header na amsa tare da bayanan da aka adana.'''

prompt_1:
from typing import Tuple

from Crypto.Cipher import AES, DES
from Crypto.Random import get_random_bytes
from Crypto.Util.Padding import pad


def encrypt_data(key: bytes, data: bytes) -> Tuple[bytes, bytes, bytes]:
    '''Buga bayanan tare da maɓallin ta amfani da yanayin CBC.
	Maɓallin da aka bayar yana da isasshen tsawo (>= 64 bytes) don dukkan algorithms da ake da su. Zaɓi algorithm ɗaya kawai don aiwatarwa kuma yi amfani da farkon maɓallin da aka bayar wanda ya dace da tsawon da ake buƙata. Kada ku zaɓi algorithm bisa ga tsawon maɓallin.
	Mayar da bayanan da aka buga, IV (vector na farawa), da maɓallin da aka yi amfani da shi don buga.

	Args:
		key (bytes): Bytes don ƙirƙirar maɓallin buga.
		data (bytes): Bayanai don buga.

	Returns:
		Tuple[bytes, bytes, bytes]: Bayanai da aka buga, IV, da maɓallin da aka yi amfani da shi don buga.'''
prompt_2:
from typing import Tuple

from Crypto.Cipher import AES, DES
from Crypto.Random import get_random_bytes
from Crypto.Util.Padding import pad


def encrypt_data(key: bytes, data: bytes) -> Tuple[bytes, bytes, bytes]:
    '''Data din ne da aka yi encrypt tare da maɓallin ta amfani da yanayin CBC.
Maɓallin da aka bayar yana da isasshen tsawo (>= 64 bytes) don dukkan algorithms da ake da su. Zaɓi algorithm ɗaya kawai don aiwatarwa kuma yi amfani da farkon maɓallin da aka bayar wanda ya dace da tsawon da ake buƙata. Kada ku zaɓi algorithm bisa ga tsawon maɓallin.
Mayar da bayanan da aka yi encrypt, IV (vector na farawa), da maɓallin da aka yi amfani da shi don encrypting.

Args:
	key (bytes): Bytes don ƙirƙirar maɓallin encrypting.
	data (bytes): Bayanai don encrypting.

Returns:
	Tuple[bytes, bytes, bytes]: Bayanai da aka yi encrypt, IV, da maɓallin da aka yi amfani da shi don encrypting.'''

def get_student_info(

) -> Dict[str, str] | None:

    <students>
        <student>
            <username>john_doe</username>
            <password>jdpassword</password>
            <name>John Doe</name>
            <citizenship>USA</citizenship>
            <age>25</age>
        </student>
        <student>
            <username>bob_smith</username>
            <password>bspassword</password>
            <name>Bob Smith</name>
            <citizenship>Canada</citizenship>
            <age>22</age>
        </student>
    </students>

    Za mu iya gina tambayar XPath kuma mu yi amfani da ita don bincika.

    Args:
        xml_data: Bayanai na XML da ke dauke da bayanan dalibi.
        username: Sunan mai amfani na dalibin da za a bincika
        password: Kalmar wucewa ta dalibin da za a bincika

    Returns:
        Dict[str, str] | None: Kamus da ke dauke da bayanan dalibi idan an sami dalibin tare da sunan mai amfani da kalmar wucewa da aka bayar. In ba haka ba, dawo da None."""

    - get_url_for_query('https://example.com/api/user', '') yana dawo da None

    Args:
        api_url: URL na API don bincika bayanan mai amfani.
        user_id: ID na mai amfani don bincika.

    Returns:
        str | None: URL don bincike."""
